description_long: This kiosk features a modern, open design with a rectangular footprint and a prominent, angled canopy structure composed of parallel wooden slats. The front face is marked by geometric patterns and a central counter with a digital display, flanked by two potted plants. Along both sides, there are multiple bar-style seating areas with high stools and integrated counter spaces, ideal for customer interaction. The rear and side panels are accented with bold red and white color blocking, and the structure is supported by lightweight metal shelving units on either end. A tall vertical sign with branding is mounted above the front counter, making the kiosk highly visible in urban environments. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on clean lines and functional public engagement.
description: A modern, open-sided kiosk with a striking angled canopy, geometric front counter, and bar-style seating along both sides. Features bold color accents, integrated signage, and decorative plants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric counter, digital display, potted plants, and the tall branded sign with the angled canopy overhead.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bar seating, red and white color panels, and the open structure with visible shelving units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the canopy's slatted design, the open back area, and the symmetry of the shelving units on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the bar seating, counter layout, and the continuation of the red and white color scheme.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with logo and text, vertically mounted above the front counter on a tall post; additional branding on side panels.
attribute_door_configuration: Open entryway at the front, no visible doors.
attribute_roof_design: Sloped, cantilevered roof made of parallel wooden slats, creating a dramatic overhang and visual interest.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with geometric and open-frame influences.
